global_description: Medium-sized insect with a flat, oval body, typically brown or black, with a hard exoskeleton. It has long, slender antennae and six spiny legs. The wings are flat and lie over the back, though not always used for flying.

part_details.head: Small with long, slender antennae
part_details.legs: Six spiny legs attached to thorax

spatial_relations: Head at front, abdomen at rear
